'''toyagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:faberoo|faberoo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:faberoo|faberoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| toyagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyagithi|toyagithi]] || [[word:toyagiji|toyagiji]] || [[word:toyagishi|toyagishi]] || [[word:toyagiki|toyagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyaguthuthu|toyaguthuthu]] || [[word:toyagujuju|toyagujuju]] || [[word:toyagushushu|toyagushushu]] || [[word:toyagukuku|toyagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyaguthu|toyaguthu]] || [[word:toyaguju|toyaguju]] || [[word:toyagushu|toyagushu]] || [[word:toyaguku|toyaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyagufthuf|toyagufthuf]] || [[word:toyagufjuf|toyagufjuf]] || [[word:toyagufshuf|toyagufshuf]] || [[word:toyagufkuf|toyagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyagethe|toyagethe]] || [[word:toyageje|toyageje]] || [[word:toyageshe|toyageshe]] || [[word:toyageke|toyageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyagothotho|toyagothotho]] || [[word:toyagojojo|toyagojojo]] || [[word:toyagoshosho|toyagoshosho]] || [[word:toyagokoko|toyagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyagotho|toyagotho]] || [[word:toyagojo|toyagojo]] || [[word:toyagosho|toyagosho]] || [[word:toyagoko|toyagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyagofthof|toyagofthof]] || [[word:toyagofjof|toyagofjof]] || [[word:toyagofshof|toyagofshof]] || [[word:toyagofkof|toyagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfthÃŸf|toyagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfjÃŸf|toyagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfshÃŸf|toyagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfkÃŸf|toyagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|toyagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|toyagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|toyagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|toyagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfthÃŸf|toyagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfjÃŸf|toyagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfshÃŸf|toyagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfkÃŸf|toyagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfthÃŸf|toyagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfjÃŸf|toyagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfshÃŸf|toyagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyagÃŸfkÃŸf|toyagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyagÃḊthÃḊ|toyagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:toyagÃḊjÃḊ|toyagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:toyagÃḊshÃḊ|toyagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:toyagÃḊkÃḊ|toyagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyagathatha|toyagathatha]] || [[word:toyagajaja|toyagajaja]] || [[word:toyagashasha|toyagashasha]] || [[word:toyagakaka|toyagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyagatha|toyagatha]] || [[word:toyagaja|toyagaja]] || [[word:toyagasha|toyagasha]] || [[word:toyagaka|toyagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyagafthaf|toyagafthaf]] || [[word:toyagafjaf|toyagafjaf]] || [[word:toyagafshaf|toyagafshaf]] || [[word:toyagafkaf|toyagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:toyagasha|toyagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyagshÃḋsha|toyagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyagrosha|toyagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyagmusha|toyagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyagyasha|toyagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyagnkshÃḋsha|gotoyagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyagnkrosha|gotoyagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyagnkmusha|gotoyagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyagnkyasha|gotoyagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:toyayagasha|toyayagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyayagshÃḋsha|toyayagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyayagrosha|toyayagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyayagmusha|toyayagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyayagyasha|toyayagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyayagnkshÃḋsha|gotoyayagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyayagnkrosha|gotoyayagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyayagnkmusha|gotoyayagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyayagnkyasha|gotoyayagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:teyÃḊgasha|teyÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:teyÃḊgshÃḋsha|teyÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:teyÃḊgrosha|teyÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:teyÃḊgmusha|teyÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:teyÃḊgyasha|teyÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goteyÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|goteyÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goteyÃḊgnkrosha|goteyÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goteyÃḊgnkmusha|goteyÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goteyÃḊgnkyasha|goteyÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:toyfagasha|toyfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyfagshÃḋsha|toyfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyfagrosha|toyfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyfagmusha|toyfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyfagyasha|toyfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyfagnkshÃḋsha|gotoyfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyfagnkrosha|gotoyfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyfagnkmusha|gotoyfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyfagnkyasha|gotoyfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
